verse_text: There is therefore now no condemnation to those who are in Christ Jesus, who do not walk according to the flesh, but according to the Spirit.

pericope.title: The Spirit Defeats Sin and the Flesh

links.context: Israel was to walk in the ordinances of the Mosaic Law. The Church, on the other hand, is to walk in the Law of Christ, a higher standard than the Mosaic ([[ROM.8:1]]-4).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
